name: strideos
description: Local-first endurance coaching skills for Codex and ChatGPT.

interface.longDescription: StrideOS helps an athlete onboard, interpret permitted training evidence, build and adapt an endurance plan, use optional fueling support, and create a private coach room. The athlete keeps authority: plans and local records require approval, provider routes fail closed, and no provider account is silently connected.
defaultPrompt: Build my athlete map and recommend a safe starting week.
Review my recent training and propose next week.
Create a private coach room I control.
